title: Caldera - WMIC OS and Hardware Enumeration (Windows)
description: Detects WMIC-based system profiling commands used by Caldera T1082 discovery operations. The Caldera discovery adversary profile queries Win32_OperatingSystem, Win32_ComputerSystem, Win32_Processor, and installed software to build a comprehensive host profile. This process_creation level rule focuses on wmic.exe command-line patterns distinct from the PowerShell Get-WmiObject variant.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\wmic.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*os get*') or ('Process Name' like '*\\wmic.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*computersystem get*') or ('Process Name' like '*\\wmic.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*cpu get*') or ('Process Name' like '*\\wmic.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*product get*') or ('Process Name' like '*\\wmic.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*nic get*'))
falsepositives: IT inventory and asset management tools using WMIC
